action_items.action: Review GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match — Jessica moved it to In Product at 11:26 BST today while absent (Day 2 sick). Her Figma designs (two options) are ready per her message yesterday. Review both options and provide feedback before Tinder Widget Planning outcomes are actioned. NEW since morning.

Unblock GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign — still Blocked and In Product, updated 10:30 BST today with no resolution visible. Blocker now exceeds one week (since 2026-04-16). Should have been addressed in Ciara/Mike sync at 09:30; confirm resolution before 15:30 grooming. Carry forward from morning.

Respond to Jessica Dordevic re: transparent icon changes — she flagged she was not informed and needs clarity before finalising Tinder designs. No new DM from Jessica today (likely still unwell Day 2). Carry forward from morning.

Make white container styling decision — container + stroke + shadow vs no container/no shadow. Ciara raised in #gdc-product-led-growth on 22 Apr at 11:45 BST. Still unresolved. Blocking design consistency across site. Carry forward from morning.

Investigate GDCU-8810 Apple/Google developer account blocker — still In Progress with Blocked priority. Harden Wallace needs to confirm what external provisioning is required from Apple/Google to unblock. Carry forward from morning.
Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page — In Product since 22 Apr, Miguel Migneco. Updated 12:06 BST today. Carry forward from morning.
Review and sign off GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign CA/FR Casino Page — In Product since 16 Apr, Ciara Carroll. No movement today. Carry forward from morning.

Raise Jira ticket for Eoin McCarthy's raw HTML content issues — two live pages broken by editor-added raw HTML (flagged in #gdc-pod 22 Apr 15:54 BST). No ticket confirmed created yet. Carry forward from morning.

Investigate 'rotate your device' UX bug flagged by Gabriel Cornoiu in #gdc-pod at 12:09 BST today — message is showing incorrectly for non-mobile devices. NEW since morning. Assess whether a Jira ticket is needed.

Finalise pre-project checklist with Chloe Christie — Gabriel added two suggestions in DM at 09:27 BST today (SEO/IA considerations for new pages/hubs; which operator attributes to display). Incorporate and share final version. NEW since morning.

Address GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management — Sanja Budic, In QA, Blocked priority. Updated 08:56 BST today. Not in morning report. Understand the QA blocker and whether Mike's input is needed to unblock. NEW since morning.

Assign owner to GDCU-8834 Implement Fixes for Cool Tones Update — currently unassigned in Backlog, updated 10:30 BST today. Multiple live issues logged (CA/FR table contrast, toast message, accessibility failures). Needs owner before 15:30 grooming session.

Resolve NZ Instagram Headers logo type for GDCU-8840 — Chloe Christie asked Mike and Miguel in #gdc-product-design-pod (22 Apr 12:42 BST) to confirm which logo type to use (transparent 150px vs square 300px). Miguel to review Origins availability and confirm.

Data analytics coverage with Vic Dadson off 2 weeks — Mike has already left Vic a briefing note (DM today 09:05 BST). Confirm David Mulero Pino is covering critical reports in the interim; actions for Vic's return (speak to Nemanja, data engineering reqs) are already noted.

Check Jessica Dordevic sick status Day 2 — no DM received from Jessica today. GDCU-8879 Genesis Carousel (To Do, assigned to Jessica) may need re-assigning for continuity. GDCU-8546 is now In Product so Tinder timeline risk is partially mitigated.

needs_input.context: NEW since morning — moved to In Product at 11:26 BST today. Jessica submitted Figma designs (two options) before going off sick. Mike needs to review both options, provide feedback on transparent icon concerns, and confirm direction. This was the subject of the 10:30 Tinder Widget Planning session with Chloe Christie today.

Still Blocked and In Product (updated 10:30 BST today). Over one week in this state since 2026-04-16. Was the primary topic in the 09:30 Ciara/Mike sync. Mike needs to confirm blocker resolution or escalation path before the 15:30 backlog grooming session.

Updated 12:06 BST today. Miguel has been actively iterating; design discussed in #gdc-product-led-growth with Ciara. Needs Mike's review of the latest iteration (hub landing page, tip cards, operator offers module) to either approve or feed back and unblock dev handoff.
